form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months favourite; won by a long-neck at Belmont Park Cl1 March 25 over 1000m defeating Wiluna Lass carrying 60kg at $2.80. Previously second-up favourite; won by 2.5 len at Bunbury Mdn November 13 over 1000m defeating Lemmor with 58kg at $8. Came into his fresh win without a trial and he looks ready to go on with the job.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide until obtaining the lead near the 700m.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last of 13 at this track Westspeed Heat November 8 over 1200m, 6 len behind Define Beautiful carrying 58.5kg at $26. First up last campaign sixth of 10 at Pinjarra Westspeed Plat June 28 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Empress Of India carrying 57kg at $21. Prefer to see how he returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 12 at Albany Rtg 58+ on April 5 over 1000m, slow going neck behind Niccy's Affair with 56.5kg at $3. The race before that rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 12 at Albany Rtg 58+ on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 1.4 len behind God Has Drifted with 56kg at $7. Others have better credentials.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted outwards and dipped shortly after the start.
Stumbled on jumping unbalancing the rider.
Held up from on straightening until near the 100m.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 9 at this track Westspeed Plat on April 1 over 1100m, slow going 2.5 len behind Girls Day Out with 57kg at $11. The start before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at this track Cl3 March 18 over 1000m defeating Niccimota with 54.5kg at $6.50. Going well enough to give this a shake.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted ground under pressure in the straight.
Rider dropped her whip near the 150m.
Rounding the home turn, shifted ground outwards.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start came from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track Cl1 on April 3 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Rodney Oh Rodney carrying 57kg at $4.80. The start before that eased back early on second last in a small field at this track Cl3 on March 18 over 1000m, 0.7 len behind Soldier Of God with 58kg at $6. Finished strongly last start and this looks to shape favourably.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Recent form sound. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running for the entire length of the straight.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign third of 9 at York November 9 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Pretty Devine with 57.5kg at $2.10. When resuming last campaign second of 8 at Belmont Park Cl3 August 27 over 1000m, soft track; 0.5 len behind Magic Belle carrying 58.5kg at $2.20. Late scratching last week but his trial coming in says he's ready to go.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages. Raced wide from the 600m.
Raced wide throughout and keenly through the early and middle stages.
Over-raced through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 11 at this track Cl1 on April 3 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Rodney Oh Rodney with 59.5kg at $5. The start before that from last on the turn 4th of 8 at Belmont Park Cl1 on March 25 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind Acorn carrying 59.5kg at $4.20. Big chance on the quick turnaround.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign seventh of 11 at Belmont Park 0Mwly September 13 over 1200m, soft track; 6 len behind Tropicconi with 54kg at $2.60. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 2.5 len Belmont Park Cl1 F&M August 27 over 1200m slow track defeating Lipstick Jungle with 58kg at $2.90. Fitter for two trials leading into this and she can resume on a winning note.
